title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 316.238 - Rock climbing walls, subject to amusement ride regulations, when
text:
316.238.  Rock climbing walls, subject to amusement ride regulations, when. — All rock climbing walls over ten feet tall operated in this state, except as provided in paragraphs (d) and (e) of subdivision (1) of section 316.203, shall be subject to the same rules and regulations as amusement rides pursuant to sections 316.200 to 316.238.
(L. 2004 H.B. 1403) 
Effective 1-01-05
